sentences.arabic: لَا يَعُودُ الْمُسَافِرُ الْحَقِيقِيُّ مِنْ رِحْلَتِهِ كَمَا غَادَرَ؛ إِذْ تَنْسَجُ الْأَمَاكِنُ الْغَرِيبَةُ خُيُوطَهَا فِي نَسِيجِ الرُّوحِ وَتُعِيدُ تَعْرِيفَ مَا كَانَ مُسَلَّمًا بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi putnik ne vraća se s puta onakvim kakvim je otišao; strana mjesta tkaju svoje niti u tkaninu duše i redefiraju ono što se uzimalo zdravo za gotovo.
sentences.translationEn: The true traveller does not return from their journey as they left; foreign places weave their threads into the fabric of the soul and redefine what was taken for granted.
